summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. The validator identifies fourteen targets as security-sensitive, so those exact PRs are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. Remaining hydrated open PRs are classified independently; no close, merge, label, comment, or fix mutation is planned.
